message:
bench: add content_dedup hot-path Criterion benchmarks

4 bench functions for the content-addressable dedup engine:
- sha256_hash: raw hashing at 64B/256B/1KB/4KB/16KB payloads
- process_new: full engine pipeline for unique segments (256B/1KB/4KB)
- process_dedup_hit: duplicate segment detection (hash + store lookup)
- process_inline: below-threshold inline path (no hash, no store)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -486,6 +486,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "bloom_filter_ops"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "content_dedup_ops"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
